title: Per-Model Profile Schema
codeQuote: pub struct ModelProfile { name: String, context_length: Int, max_output_tokens: Int, supports_tool_calling: Bool, tool_format: String, supports_json_mode: Bool, supports_system_message: Bool, template: String, strengths: List<String>, weaknesses: List<String>, stop_sequences: List<String> }
patchShape: Add JSON schema extending cli-devin's Model Selection table to include small-model-specific fields: tool_format, template, strengths, weaknesses, stop_sequences
acceptanceCriteria: JSON schema validates all 12 ModelProfile fields; includes example profiles for 3 common small models; maps tool_format enum to Devin's tool-calling modes; documents template mapping to chat template formats

title: Profile Lookup with Substring Matching
codeQuote: pub fn loadProfile(modelName: String): ModelProfile { let profilePath = "profiles/${modelName}.toml"; if pathExists(profilePath) { return parsed as ModelProfile } for (key, profile) in BUILTIN_PROFILES { if modelName.contains(key) || key.contains(modelName) { return profile } } return ModelProfile { context_length: 8192, supports_tool_calling: false, tool_format: "text", template: "chatml", weaknesses: ["unknown_capabilities"] } }
patchShape: Add lookup function implementing 3-tier fallback: custom config → built-in registry (substring match) → conservative default. Document substring matching heuristic for flexible model name matching
acceptanceCriteria: Implements 3-tier fallback: custom → built-in (substring) → default; substring matching is bidirectional; default profile uses conservative assumptions; returns structured ModelProfile with all 12 fields

title: Bayesian Tool Scoring with Laplace Smoothing
codeQuote: pub struct ToolScore { tool_name: String, task_type: String, success_count: Int, failure_count: Int, total_calls: Int, avg_latency_ms: Int, confidence: Float, last_error: String? } fn computeConfidence(self, score: ToolScore): Float { return (score.success_count + 1).toFloat() / (score.total_calls + 2).toFloat() }
patchShape: Add Bayesian confidence calculation using Laplace smoothing: confidence = (successes + 1) / (total + 2). Include exploration bonus (0.15) and confidence cap (0.95) to prevent lockout
acceptanceCriteria: Implements Laplace smoothing formula; unknown tools return baseline 0.5 + exploration_bonus (0.15) = 0.65; confidence capped at 0.95; tracks success/failure per (tool_name, task_type) tuple; persists scores across sessions via JSON file

title: Tool Demotion Thresholds
codeQuote: pub fn shouldAvoid(self, toolName: String, taskType: String): Bool { let key = "${toolName}:${taskType}"; if !self.scores.has(key) { return false } let score = self.scores.get(key); return score.total_calls >= 3 && score.confidence < 0.35 }
patchShape: Add demotion logic that flags tools for avoidance when: (1) minimum data threshold (≥3 calls) AND (2) confidence below threshold (<0.35)
acceptanceCriteria: Implements two-condition demotion: total_calls >= 3 AND confidence < 0.35; returns false for unknown tools; returns false for tools with insufficient data (<3 calls); returns true only when both conditions met; documented threshold rationale

title: Escalation Provider Config + Conversation Format Conversion
codeQuote: const ESCALATION_PROVIDERS = { anthropic: { name: 'Claude', baseUrl: 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1', envKey: 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', defaultModel: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', models: [...] } } const anthropicMessages = nonSystem.map(m => { if (m.role === 'tool') { return { role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: m.tool_call_id, content: m.content }] } } if (m.tool_calls) { return { role: 'assistant', content: m.tool_calls.map(tc => ({ type: 'tool_use', id: tc.id, name: tc.function.name, input: JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments) })) } } })
patchShape: Extend cli-devin's cloud_handoff reference to include: provider config schema, OpenAI ↔ Anthropic conversation format conversion, canEscalate() gate with session limits, auto-detection from env vars
acceptanceCriteria: Provider config includes: name, baseUrl, envKey, defaultModel, models array; implements bidirectional OpenAI ↔ Anthropic format conversion; canEscalate() checks enabled flag AND session count < max_per_session; auto-detects providers from env vars in preference order; includes escalation-specific system prompt template
